---
title: "Team — Pakistan.AI"
subtitle: "Neural Networks course project · National Yunlin University of Science and Technology"
toc: false
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" icon=false}
**Group:** Pakistan.AI  ·  **Course:** Neural Networks  ·
**Instructor:** Prof. Hsuan-Ting Chang  ·
**Affiliation:** FIC Lab, National Yunlin University of Science and Technology
:::

## Members

| Member | Student ID | Profile |
|--------|-----------|---------|
| **Raja, Muhammad Junaid Ali Asif** | **M11217073** | [ORCID 0009-0008-9249-9983](https://orcid.org/0009-0008-9249-9983) · FIC Lab, National Yunlin University of Science and Technology |
| **Sultan, Adil** | **M11217078** | FIC Lab, National Yunlin University of Science and Technology |
| **Hassan, Shahzaib Ahmed** | **M11217081** | FIC Lab, National Yunlin University of Science and Technology |

All three members contributed to the design, experiments, analysis, and this report.

## Contributions

- **Validation spine & metric** (`src/cv.py`), the frozen patient-grouped folds, and the
  `cv-guardian` no-leak discipline.
- **Tabular feature engineering & GBDT** (`src/features.py`, `src/gbdt.py`) — the efficient
  anchor, including the patient-relative ugly-duckling features and the underfit-bug fix.
- **Image experts & the 12-backbone sweep** (`src/vision/*`) — the primary backbone and the
  resolution/regularizer ablations.
- **Efficiency frontier & stacking** (`src/efficiency.py`, `src/stack.py`,
  `reports/frontier.py`) — the three-axis cost measurement and the trivial-combiner result.
- **EDA, performance analysis, and this companion site** — the figures, the negative-results
  catalogue, and the write-up.

## Citing

To cite the repository, use the metadata in
[`CITATION.cff`](https://github.com/junaidaliop/isic2024-tbp/blob/main/CITATION.cff) (GitHub
renders a "Cite this repository" button from it). Please **also** cite the SLICE-3D dataset and
the official metric — see [References](references.qmd).
